features: Extra Long Full Body Warmth – KEPLIN 2L extra long hot water bottle with luxury fleece cover keeps your whole body warm, ideal for cuddling in bed or on the sofa during cold winter nights.
Durable Natural Rubber – Made from high-quality natural rubber for maximum safety, durability, and heat retention; designed to outperform traditional bottles with long-lasting warmth.
Soothing Pain Relief – Flexible and extra-long design makes it perfect for targeting neck, shoulders, back, abdomen, and legs, helping relieve cramps, muscle tension, and aches.
Soft & Cosy Fleece Cover – Super soft fleece cover adds comfort and insulation, preventing direct contact with hot surfaces while providing a cosy, snuggly feel against the skin.

All-Year Versatility – Use warm in winter for comfort or fill with cold water in summer for cooling relief; perfect gift for Christmas, birthdays, or Mother’s Day. Dimensions: approx. 72cm x 12cm, Weight: 450g.
